description_long: This chaise features a modern, streamlined silhouette with a mustard yellow fabric upholstery that covers the entire structure. The backrest is gently curved and rises to a medium height, providing comfortable support along the length of the seat. The right side of the chaise extends outward to form a lounge section, creating an L-shaped seating area with three distinct seat cushions. Both armrests are subtly integrated into the frame, curving smoothly from the backrest to the front. The legs are short, straight, and made of dark wood, elevating the chaise slightly above the ground. The overall design is minimalist, with no visible decorative elements or patterns, making it suitable for contemporary urban environments.
description: A modern mustard yellow chaise with a curved backrest, integrated armrests, and three seat cushions, supported by short dark wooden legs. Its minimalist design and L-shaped lounge section make it ideal for urban interiors.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full L-shaped seating area, three seat cushions, and both integrated armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the chaise's extended lounge section and the gentle curve of the backrest and armrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, unadorned backrest and the chaise's overall width.
description_view_3: Angled view emphasizing the chaise's depth, the right-side lounge extension, and the smooth transition between backrest and armrest.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is medium-height, smoothly curved, and unsegmented, providing a continuous support surface without any visible tufting, buttons, or decorative elements.
attribute_armrest_presence: Armrests are present on both sides, seamlessly integrated into the frame with a gentle curve that matches the backrest.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are short, straight, and cylindrical, made of dark wood with a simple, unadorned finish, providing stable support and a slight elevation.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is a solid mustard yellow fabric with a smooth, matte finish and no visible patterns, tufting, or quilting.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There are three seat cushions: two standard-sized on the left and one extended cushion forming the lounge section on the right. All cushions appear to be loose and evenly arranged, with no visible layering.
